examples: It's quite true, the franchisor should provide guidance in running the business.
If the franchisor isn't giving you some territory to yourself, you're not getting a fair deal.
So the ability to duplicate your success is vital to a franchisor with aspirations of rapid growth.
Would a franchisor exploit my desire to not be employed to promote a fraudulent opportunity?
Most of the costs, at least in my systems, are negotiated at the franchisor level.
